responsibilities: Design and implement feedback control algorithms including PID and model predictive control for robotic and mechanical systems
Develop mathematical state-space and dynamic models of physical systems to support control algorithm design and validation
Perform system identification experiments to characterize plant dynamics and tune control parameters for optimal performance
Simulate and validate control algorithms in MATLAB and Simulink before deploying to embedded hardware platforms
Implement real-time embedded control software in C++ to drive motors, actuators, and mechanical subsystems with high precision
Tune and optimize control loops to meet stability, response time, and steady-state error performance requirements
Collaborate with mechanical and electrical engineers to define actuator and sensor specifications that meet control performance targets
Conduct hardware-in-the-loop and bench testing to validate control system behavior under real-world operating conditions
Analyze control system stability and robustness using frequency-domain and time-domain analysis techniques
